word: H7741 - שָׁוֵה קִרְיָתַיִם - Shâvêh Qiryâthayim - shaw-vay' kir-yawthah'-yim - Shaveh Kiriathaim

sections.paragraph:
שׁוה קריתים - shâvêh qiryâthayim - shaw-vay' kir-yaw-thah'-yim

From the same as H7740 and the dual of H7151; plain of a double city; Shaveh Kirjathajim, a place East of the Jordan: - Shaveh Kiriathaim.
